inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: The acquisition cost of the property before any rehabilitation.

businessContext_i18n.en: The acquisition cost of the property before any rehabilitation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir rehabilitasyon öncesi mülkün edinme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'acquisition du bien avant toute réhabilitation.
businessContext_i18n.es: El costo de adquisición de la propiedad antes de cualquier rehabilitación.

inputs.label: Rehab Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total budget for renovating the property to increase its value and rentability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total budget for renovating the property to increase its value and rentability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mülkün değerini ve kiralanabilirliğini artırmak için yenileme bütçesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbudget für die Renovierung der Immobilie zur Steigerung von Wert und Mietrendite
businessContext_i18n.fr: Budget total pour rénover le bien afin d'augmenter sa valeur et sa rentabilité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presupuesto total para renovar la propiedad para aumentar su valor y rentabilidad.

inputs.label: After Repair Value (ARV)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the property after rehabilitation is complete.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated market value of the property after rehabilitation is complete.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rehabilitasyon tamamlandıktan sonra mülkün tahmini piyasa değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Marktwert der Immobilie nach Abschluss der Sanierung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur marchande estimée du bien après réhabilitation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de mercado estimado de la propiedad después de completar la rehabilitación.

inputs.label: Monthly Rent
inputs.businessContext: Gross monthly rental income expected from the property after rehab.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gross monthly rental income expected from the property after rehab.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rehabilitasyon sonrası mülkten beklenen brüt aylık kira geliri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bruttomonatsmieteinnahmen, die nach der Sanierung von der Immobilie erwartet werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu locatif mensuel brut attendu du bien après réhabilitation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso bruto mensual por alquiler esperado de la propiedad después de la rehabilitación.

inputs.label: Down Payment (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of purchase price paid upfront as down payment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of purchase price paid upfront as down payment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Peşinat olarak ödenen satın alma fiyatı yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Kaufpreises, der als Anzahlung gezahlt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du prix d'achat payé d'avance comme acompte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del precio de compra pagado por adelantado como pago inicial.

inputs.label: Interest Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate on the mortgage used for purchase.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual interest rate on the mortgage used for purchase.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satın alma için kullanılan ipotek üzerindeki yıllık faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Zinssatz der Hypothek für den Kauf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt annuel sur le prêt hypothécaire utilisé pour l'achat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés anual de la hipoteca utilizada para la compra.

inputs.label: Loan Term (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the mortgage loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the mortgage loan in years.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du prêt hypothécaire en années.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del préstamo hipotecario en años.

inputs.label: Monthly Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly operating expenses including taxes, insurance, management, maintenance, and vacancy allowance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monthly operating expenses including taxes, insurance, management, maintenance, and vacancy allowance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergiler, sigorta, yönetim, bakım ve boşluk payı dahil toplam aylık işletme giderleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Betriebskosten einschließlich Steuern, Versicherung, Verwaltung, Instandhaltung und Leerstandsreserve.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des charges d'exploitation mensuelles incluant taxes, assurance, gestion, entretien et provision pour vacance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos operativos mensuales totales, incluidos impuestos, seguros, administración, mantenimiento y asignación por desocupación.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
